{
  "society_power": 4.0,
  "state_power": 5.0,
  "society_change": 0.5,
  "state_change": 0.5,
  "key_event": "1935 Copper Mining Strike and 1938 Native Reserves Crisis",
  "reasoning": "The strikes and land crises strengthened civil society through organization and resistance, while the state's economic dependence on copper and wartime priorities moderately increased its power."
}
